untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires identification of parallel trend lines and consolidation structure, which cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. The signal requires pattern recognition (two parallel boundaries, post-move occurrence, geometric structure) that is not reducible to simple indicator crossovers. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout confirmation only, but does not capture the flag consolidation geometry or the half-staff run-equal-to-run exit logic.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to approximate breakout confirmation after consolidation, but this does not capture the core flag pattern structure. True implementation requires candlestick pattern recognition or trend line fitting algorithms not available in indicator set. Success rates (64% bull, 23% average rise) and failure characteristics documented but cannot be encoded. Author silent on stop placement and bear statistics.
